item.title: 增强 TypeScript 的功能：释放泛型的实际用途 | Enhancing TypeScript's Power: Unleashing the Practical Use of Generics
item.description:
在本文中，我将根据我自己的经验向您展示一些如何使用泛型的现实示例。 这样，它对您来说会更有意义并且更容易理解。 我还将泛型的用法分为对我来说有意义的不同类别。

了解 TypeScript 泛型的基础知识

换句话说，每当您创建组件时，有时您可能不确定所需的类型。 但是，当您稍后使用该组件时，您可以灵活地传递类型。 这允许您的代码具有更大的适应性和定制性。

探索 TypeScript 中的泛型函数

定义和使用泛型函数

在 TypeScript 中，泛型函数是通过在函数名称之前包含在尖括号<>中的类型参数来定义的。 此类型参数表示将在函数中使用的泛型类型。

 function helloGenerics<T>(arg: T): T { return arg; }

假设我们有一个场景，需要创建一个函数来确定数组的长度，而不管数组包含的元素类型如何。 在这种情况下，我们可以利用泛型来完成此任务。

 function getArrayLength<T>(array: T[]): number { return array.length; } const numbers = [1, 2, 3]; const strings = ['hello', 'generics']; console.log(getArrayLength(numbers)); // Output: 3 console.log(getArrayLength(strings)); // Output: 2

利用泛型函数进行类型推断

现在，让我们假设您想要增强称为“身份”的函数的多功能性。 您希望对其进行修改，使其可以接受任何类型的参数，无论是数字、字符串还是布尔值。 为了实现这一目标，您可以考虑采用以下方法：

 // Without Using Generics function helloGenerics(arg: string | number | boolean) { return arg; } console.log(helloGenerics(10)); // Output: 10 console.log(helloGenerics("hello generics")); // Output: hello generics console.log(helloGenerics(true)); // Output: true // With Generic function helloGenerics<T>(arg: T): T { return arg; } console.log(helloGenerics(10)); // Output: 10 console.log(helloGenerics("hello generics")); // Output: hello generics console.log(helloGenerics(true)); // Output: true

在上面提供的示例中，当我们不使用泛型时，我们必须显式指定我们想要接受的参数类型。 然而，通过利用泛型的力量，我们可以简化这个过程。 使用泛型，每当我们使用任何类型的参数调用函数时，TypeScript 都会自动推断类型，使我们的代码更加简洁和高效。

泛型的实际应用

使用泛型开发灵活的 API

我们经常遇到需要与返回不同类型数据的不同 API 进行交互的情况。 为了有效地应对这一挑战，TypeScript 提供了一个名为泛型的便捷功能。 通过利用泛型，我们可以创建一个多功能函数，作为 API 调用的基础。 这使我们作为开发人员能够编写灵活、可重用且与不同 API 端点无缝集成的代码。

 // Calling An API without Generics async function ApiInstance(path: string) { const response = await fetch(`https://xyz.com/api${path}`) return response.json(); }

假设我们想用这个函数调用 API，那么我们将如何管理不同类型的不同 API 调用数据，因此我们必须使用泛型。

 // Base Function async function ApiInstance<ResultType>(path: string): Promise<ResultType> { const response = await fetch(`https://xyz.com/api${path}`) return response.json(); } interface User { name: string; email: string; username: string; } const result = await ApiInstance<User[]>('/users');

在上面提供的示例中，我们已将基本函数转换为通用函数。 这允许我们在调用函数时动态分配 API 响应的类型。 通过以这种方式利用泛型，我们可以有效地管理 API 调用并高效地处理不同的响应类型。

默认类型参数

泛型提供了在调用函数时分配默认类型的灵活性。 如果未提供特定类型，则此默认类型可用作后备选项。 通过利用这个特性，即使没有传递显式类型，我们也可以确保函数顺利运行。

 // Default Type Parameters interface DefaultUser<T> { name: T; } async function ApiInstance<ResultType = DefaultUser<string>>(path: string): Promise<ResultType> { const response = await fetch(`https://xyz.com/api${path}`) return response.json(); } const result = await ApiInstance('/users');

创建多态组件

在 MUI 和 Chakra UI 等库中，您可能遇到过使用 as 关键字的组件。 这允许您指定组件的标签名称，然后该组件将呈现为您在文档对象模型 (DOM) 中的“as”属性中传递的标签。 这些组件被称为多态组件，在开发需要跨不同组件保持一致功能同时保持特定主题的广泛前端应用程序时，它们被证明是非常宝贵的。

这是它的基本示例

// Polymorphic Component(Without Typescript) const PolymorphicComponent = ({ as, children }) => { const Component = as || "span"; return <Component>{children}</Component>; }; <PolymorphicComponent as="button">Hello Polymorphic</PolymorphicComponent> <PolymorphicComponent as="div">Hello Polymorphic</PolymorphicComponent> <PolymorphicComponent as="span">Hello Polymorphic</PolymorphicComponent> <PolymorphicComponent>Hello Polymorphic</PolymorphicComponent>

当使用没有 TypeScript 的组件时，可能会导致严重错误，主要有两个问题：
例如，如果我们错误地将无效的标签名称传递给“as”属性，它可能会呈现不适当的元素。

此外，如果我们尝试将属性分配给特定标签，例如将 href 属性与 span 标签一起使用，则会被认为是不正确的。

使用extends关键字

为了解决这些问题，我们可以利用仿制药的力量来克服这些挑战。 通过使用泛型，我们可以确保类型安全并防止这些潜在的陷阱。

 export const PolymorphicComponent = <T extends React.ElementType = "span" >({ as, children, }: { as?: T; children: React.ReactNode; }) => { const Component = as || "span"; return <Component>{children}</Component>; }; <PolymorphicComponent as="span">Hello Polymorphic!</PolymorphicComponent> // It gives an error when invalid tagname is passed <PolymorphicComponent as="macron">Hello Polymorphic!</PolymorphicComponent>

在给定的示例中，我们可以观察extends关键字的用法，该关键字的目的是验证传递给组件的 props。 在这个特定场景中，我使用了React.ElementType ，它包含所有有效的 HTML 标签。 因此，任何传递无效标签名称的尝试都将被自动检测并阻止。 然而，尽管有这个解决方案，我们仍然需要解决我们之前讨论的第二个问题。

为了解决这个问题，让我们深入研究下面提供的代码：

如何使用 type 关键字继承

/* React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<"button"> -> It gives all the props of the button */ type PolymorphicComponentProps<T extends React.ElementType> = { as?: T; children: React.ReactNode; } & React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<T>; export const PolymorphicComponent = <T extends React.ElementType = "span" >({ as, children, }: PolymorphicComponentProps<T>) => { const Component = as || "span"; return <Component>{children}</Component>; };

在上面的示例中，我使用 type 关键字来定义自定义类型。 通过合并 ComponentPropsWithoutRef 实用程序，我们可以轻松访问与特定 HTML 标记关联的所有有效 props。 这使我们能够在自定义类型中无缝继承这些道具。 因此，如果有人尝试在 as 属性中传递指定标签的无效属性，则会触发错误，从而确保我们代码的完整性。 通过这次成功的实施，我们有效地创建了一个强大的多态组件。

结论

总而言之，Typescript 泛型提供了一种编写代码的优越方法，可以提高效率并创建小而强大的组件。 通过探索提供的实际示例，您已经全面了解了该主题，现在可以在自己的代码库中以实际的方式应用它。 通过牢牢掌握 Typescript 中泛型的基础知识，您将有能力探索更高级的概念，并在未来的项目中进一步利用泛型的强大功能。



原文:

In this article, I will show you some real-life examples of how Generics are used, based on my own experience. This way, it'll make more sense to you and be easier to understand. I've also divided the usage of Generics into different categories that make sense to me.

Introduction to TypeScript Generics

Understanding the basics of TypeScript generics

TypeScript generics provide developers with the ability to create flexible and reusable code by introducing the concept of parameterizing types.

In other words, Whenever you're creating a component, there may be instances where you're unsure about the types you'll need. However, you have the flexibility to pass the types when you use the component later on. This allows for greater adaptability and customization in your code.

Exploring Generic Functions in TypeScript

Defining and using generic functions

In TypeScript, generic functions are defined by including a type parameter, enclosed in angle brackets <> before the function name. This type parameter represents the generic type that will be used within the function.

function helloGenerics<T>(arg: T): T { return arg;
}

Suppose we have a scenario where we need to create a function that can determine the length of an array, regardless of the type of elements it contains. In such cases, we can utilise generics to accomplish this task.

function getArrayLength<T>(array: T[]): number { return array.length;
} const numbers = [1, 2, 3];
const strings = ['hello', 'generics']; console.log(getArrayLength(numbers)); // Output: 3
console.log(getArrayLength(strings)); // Output: 2

Leveraging type inference with generic functions

Now, let's imagine that you want to enhance the versatility of the function called identity. You wish to modify it in such a way that it can accept arguments of any type, be it a number, string, or boolean. To achieve this, you might consider adopting the following approach:

// Without Using Generics
function helloGenerics(arg: string | number | boolean) { return arg;
} console.log(helloGenerics(10)); // Output: 10
console.log(helloGenerics("hello generics")); // Output: hello generics
console.log(helloGenerics(true)); // Output: true // With Generic
function helloGenerics<T>(arg: T): T { return arg;
} console.log(helloGenerics(10)); // Output: 10
console.log(helloGenerics("hello generics")); // Output: hello generics
console.log(helloGenerics(true)); // Output: true

In the example provided above, when we don't use generics, we have to explicitly specify the types of parameters we want to accept. However, by leveraging the power of generics, we can simplify this process. With generics, whenever we call the function with any type of argument, TypeScript automatically infers the type, making our code more concise and efficient.

Practical Applications of Generics

Developing flexible APIs with generics

We often come across situations where we need to interact with different APIs that return different types of data. To tackle this challenge effectively, TypeScript offers a handy feature called Generics. By leveraging Generics, we can create a versatile function that acts as a foundation for making API calls. This empowers us, as developers, to write code that is flexible, reusable, and seamlessly integrates with diverse API endpoints.

// Calling An API without Generics
async function ApiInstance(path: string) { const response = await fetch(`https://xyz.com/api${path}`) return response.json();
}

Let’s say if we want to call the API with this function then how we will manage the different types of different API calls data , so for that we have to use the Generics.

// Base Function
async function ApiInstance<ResultType>(path: string): Promise<ResultType> { const response = await fetch(`https://xyz.com/api${path}`) return response.json();
} interface User { name: string; email: string; username: string;
} const result = await ApiInstance<User[]>('/users');

In the example provided above, we have transformed our base function into a generic function. This allows us to dynamically assign the type of the API response when calling the function. By utilising generics in this manner, we can effectively manage API calls and handle different response types with efficiency.

Default Type Parameters

Generics offer the flexibility to assign a default type when calling a function. This default type serves as a fallback option in case no specific type is provided. By utilising this feature, we can ensure that the function operates smoothly even when no explicit type is passed.

// Default Type Parameters
interface DefaultUser<T> { name: T;
} async function ApiInstance<ResultType = DefaultUser<string>>(path: string): Promise<ResultType> { const response = await fetch(`https://xyz.com/api${path}`) return response.json();
} const result = await ApiInstance('/users');

Create Polymorphic Component

In libraries such as MUI and Chakra UI, you may have come across components that use the as keyword. This allows you to specify the tag name for the component, which will then be rendered as a tag you have passed in the "as" props in the Document Object Model (DOM). These components are known as polymorphic components, and they prove invaluable when developing extensive frontend applications that require consistent functionality across different components while maintaining specific themes.

Here is the basic example of it

// Polymorphic Component(Without Typescript)
const PolymorphicComponent = ({ as, children }) => { const Component = as || "span"; return <Component>{children}</Component>;
}; <PolymorphicComponent as="button">Hello Polymorphic</PolymorphicComponent>
<PolymorphicComponent as="div">Hello Polymorphic</PolymorphicComponent>
<PolymorphicComponent as="span">Hello Polymorphic</PolymorphicComponent>
<PolymorphicComponent>Hello Polymorphic</PolymorphicComponent>

When utilising components without TypeScript, it can lead to significant errors and major two problems are here,
For instance, if we mistakenly pass an invalid tag name to the "as" prop, it may render an inappropriate element.

Additionally, if we attempt to assign properties to a specific tag, such as using the href attribute with a span tag, it would be considered incorrect.

Use of extends keyword

To address these issues, we can leverage the power of generics to overcome such challenges. By employing generics, we can ensure type safety and prevent these potential pitfalls.

export const PolymorphicComponent = <T extends React.ElementType = "span"
>({ as, children,
}: { as?: T; children: React.ReactNode;
}) => { const Component = as || "span"; return <Component>{children}</Component>;
}; <PolymorphicComponent as="span">Hello Polymorphic!</PolymorphicComponent> // It gives an error when invalid tagname is passed
<PolymorphicComponent as="macron">Hello Polymorphic!</PolymorphicComponent>

In the given example, we can observe the usage of the extends keyword, which serves the purpose of validating the props being passed to the component. In this particular scenario, I have utilised the React.ElementType, which encompasses all the valid HTML tags. Consequently, any attempt to pass an invalid tag name will be automatically detected and prevented. However, despite this solution, we still need to address the second issue we previously discussed.

To tackle this, let's dive into the code provided below:

How to inherit with type keyword 

/* React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<"button"> -> It gives all the props of the button */
type PolymorphicComponentProps<T extends React.ElementType> = { as?: T; children: React.ReactNode;
} & React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<T>; export const PolymorphicComponent = <T extends React.ElementType = "span"
>({ as, children,
}: PolymorphicComponentProps<T>) => { const Component = as || "span"; return <Component>{children}</Component>;
};

In the example above, I employed the type keyword to define a custom type. By incorporating the ComponentPropsWithoutRef utility, we can effortlessly access all the valid props associated with a specific HTML tag. This allows us to seamlessly inherit those props within our custom type. Consequently, if someone attempts to pass invalid props for the specified tag in the as prop, an error will be triggered, ensuring the integrity of our code. With this successful implementation, we have effectively created a powerful polymorphic component.

Conclusion

To conclude, Typescript generics offer a superior approach to writing code, enabling enhanced efficiency and the creation of small yet powerful components. By exploring the practical example provided, you have gained a comprehensive understanding of this topic and can now apply it in a practical manner within your own codebase. With a solid grasp of the fundamentals of generics in Typescript, you are well-equipped to explore more advanced concepts and further leverage the power of generics in your future projects.
item.author: ultroneoustech

item.title: JavaScript“textContent”与“innerHTML” | JavaScript "textContent" vs "innerHTML"
item.description:
在 JavaScript 中， innerHTML和textContent都可以用来操作 HTML 元素内的文本。但是，两者之间有细微的差别。

让我们在本文中看看其中的区别。

而innerHTML用于将任何其他HTML 作为HTML 标记的内容传递。

对于接下来的示例，我们将使用此 HTML

 <h1>Using innerHTML:</h1> <h2 id = "innerHTML"></h2> <h1>Using textContent:</h1> <h2 id = "textContent"></h2>

我们传递了一个字符串“Hello World”作为h2的文本内容。

 document.getElementById("textContent").textContent = "Hello World";

在这里，将任何 HTML 标签作为字符串传递都不会呈现为 HTML。

输出

在这里，我们在h2标记之间传递了一些额外的 HTML <em>Hello World</em> 。 这就是为什么我们得到斜体输出

document.getElementById("innerHTML").innerHTML = "<em>Hello World</em>";

输出

包起来

我希望本教程对您有所帮助。 感谢您阅读到最后。

我很乐意在这些平台上与您联系。

一旦暂停，hira_zaira 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到其暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，hira_zaira 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，hira_zaira 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 hira_zaira 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从仪表板重新发布帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保证 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 hira_zaira：

使 hira_zaira 的所有帖子不那么明显

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 hira_zaira 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

 

In JavaScript, both the innerHTML and textContent can be used to manipulate the text inside HTML elements.However, there is a slight difference between the two.

Let's see that difference in this article.

textContent vs innerHTML

textContent is used to set the text between any tag.You pass the text as the string.

Whereas, innerHTML is used to pass any other HTML as the content of an HTML tag.

For the upcoming examples, we will use this HTML

 <h1>Using innerHTML:</h1> <h2 id = "innerHTML"></h2> <h1>Using textContent:</h1> <h2 id = "textContent"></h2>

Example of textContent

We have passed a string "Hello World" as the textual content of h2.

document.getElementById("textContent").textContent = "Hello World";

Here, passing any HTML tags as a string won't render as HTML.

Output

Example of innerHTML

Here, we passed some additional HTML <em>Hello World</em> in between the h2 tags. That is why we got the output in italics

document.getElementById("innerHTML").innerHTML = "<em>Hello World</em>";

Output

Wrapping up

I hope you found this tutorial helpful. Thank you for reading till the end.

I would love to connect with you on any of these platforms.

Once suspended, hira_zaira will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, hira_zaira will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by hira_zaira will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If hira_zaira is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag hira_zaira:

Make all posts by hira_zaira less visible

hira_zaira consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging hira_zaira will restore default visibility to their posts.

item.title: Zabbix 服务器库鲁鲁姆 | Zabbix Server Kurulumu
item.description:
如果您想使用 Türkçe kaynak hazırlamak，请在 Zabbix Web 上说，您可以在 yaşanmaması 中进行操作。

您可以使用 Ubuntu 服务器（IP、主机名、仓库）来安装它。

我的意思是，我的意思是，我的意思是，我的意思是，我的意思是。

 # mysql -uroot -p password mysql> create database zabbix character set utf8mb4 collate utf8mb4_bin; mysql> create user zabbix@localhost identified by 'password'; mysql> grant all privileges on zabbix.* to zabbix@localhost; mysql> set global log_bin_trust_function_creators = 1; mysql> quit;

验证log_bin_trust_function_creators参数，然后将其删除。

 # mysql -uroot -p password mysql> set global log_bin_trust_function_creators = 0; mysql> quit;

儿子 olarak servisleri yeniden başlatıp，sunucunun yeniden başlaması durumunda servislerin otomatik olarak çalışabilmesi için servisleri Enable ediyoruz。

 systemctl restart zabbix-server zabbix-agent apache2 systemctl enable zabbix-server zabbix-agent apache2

请勿将其设置为 Zabbix kurulumunu tamamlayabilirsiniz。



原文:

Bu yazıdaki amacım hem Türkçe kaynak hazırlamak, hemde Zabbix Web sayfasından kurulumda yaşadığım sorunların yaşanmaması için daha açık bir kurulum dökümanı hazırlamaktır.

Öncelikle kurulumu Ubuntu Server 20.04 üzerinden yapacağım. Normalde Ubuntu Server 22.04'te yapmayı planlamıştım fakat Zabbix'in kendi sayfasından aldığım döküman ile kurulumda eksik paketlet çıkmaktadır.Ayrıca dökümanda tüm servis ve uygulamaların kurulumları yazmamaktadır.Bu yazıya bunları da ekleyeceğim.

Öncelikle Ubuntu Server kurulumunu yaparak temel ayarlarını (IP,Hostname,Depo Tanımları) tamamlıyoruz.

Ardından sunucumuzu en güncel paketler ile güncelliyoruz.

apt update && apt upgrade -y

Sunucuyu güncelledikten sonra apache web server paketini kuruyoruz.

Bu aşamada zabbix paketlerinin kurulumu için zabbix repo tanımlarını sunucumuza ekliyoruz.Bu aşamada ortamınızda güvenlik ile ilgili bir tedbir bulunuyorsa sertifikayı görmezden gelebilmek için komuta --no-check-certificate parametresini ekleyebilirsiniz.

wget https://repo.zabbix.com/zabbix/6.0/ubuntu/pool/main/z/zabbix-release/zabbix-release_6.0-4+ubuntu20.04_all.deb
dpkg -i zabbix-release_6.0-4+ubuntu20.04_all.deb
apt update

Zabbix paketlerini kuruyoruz.

apt install zabbix-server-mysql zabbix-frontend-php zabbix-apache-conf zabbix-sql-scripts zabbix-agent

Zabbix arka verilerini saklayabilmek için bir veritabanına ihtiyaç duyar. Kendi web sayfasında PostgreSQL veya MySql seçenekleri ile gelmektedir.Biz kurulumumuza mysql ile devam edeceğiz.MySql veritabanı paketini kuruyoruz.

Veritabanı sunucusuna bağlanarak aşağıdaki komutları sırasıyla çalıştırıyoruz.İlk komutu çalıştırdığımzda bizden parola oluşturmamız istenecek. İlerleyen aşamalarda parola ile işlem yapacağımız için unutmayacağınız bir parola vermenizi öneriyorum.

# mysql -uroot -p
password
mysql> create database zabbix character set utf8mb4 collate utf8mb4_bin;
mysql> create user zabbix@localhost identified by 'password';
mysql> grant all privileges on zabbix.* to zabbix@localhost;
mysql> set global log_bin_trust_function_creators = 1;
mysql> quit;

Bu aşamada Zabbix veritabanına ilk şemayı ve verileri aktaracak komutu çalıştırıyoruz. Komutu çalıştırdığınızda yeni oluşturduğunuz parolayı girmeniz istenecektir.

zcat /usr/share/zabbix-sql-scripts/mysql/server.sql.gz | mysql --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -uzabbix -p zabbix

Veritabanını oluşturduktan sonra log_bin_trust_function_creatorsparametresini kapalı konuma getiriyoruz.Sırasıyla aşağıdaki komutları çalıştırıyoruz.

# mysql -uroot -p
password
mysql> set global log_bin_trust_function_creators = 0;
mysql> quit;

Zabbix konfigurasyon dosyasında(/etc/zabbix/zabbix_server.conf) MySql şifresini giriyoruz.

Son olarak servisleri yeniden başlatıp, sunucunun yeniden başlaması durumunda servislerin otomatik olarak çalışabilmesi için servisleri enable ediyoruz.

 systemctl restart zabbix-server zabbix-agent apache2
 systemctl enable zabbix-server zabbix-agent apache2

Tüm adımları tamamladıktan sonra bir web browser açarak ;

 SUNUCU_IP/zabbix/index.php

adresine giriş yaptığımız zaman Zabbix arayüzü ile karşılaşmamız gerekiyor. Bu adımda ekrandaki formları doğru bilgiler ile doldurarak Zabbix kurulumunu tamamlayabilirsiniz.
